speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] First up on the Green Desk, and <cite index="16-7,16-9">France has officially banned products containing PFAS chemicals - those 'forever chemicals' that stick around in the environment. The law covers cosmetics, clothing, and ski wax where safer alternatives exist.</cite>

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And in the UK, <cite index="16-2,16-11,16-12">wind and photovoltaic panels generated more electricity than fossil fuels in the European Union for the first time. In 2025, renewables produced 30% compared to fossil fuels at 29%.</cite> Finally catching up to Queensland's sunshine game, eh?

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Back to you legends at the desk.
